name: label
description: A token-styled native <label> with for/id association and an optional aria-hidden required marker. Server-first replacement for the Lit island (which only wrapped a native <label>).
docs: Copies the label partial to your JTE root at lievit/label.jte, reached as @template.lievit.label(forId=..., text=...). Set `forId` to the control's id for native label association. The source is yours: edit freely.
